name: Psari Plaki Sto Fourno (Baked Fish)
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds Tomatoes, peeled and strained OR
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean and wash the fish; season with salt and pepper, squeeze the juice of the lemon over it, and let it stand for 1 hour.
2. Clean onions and slice thinly; rinse with cold water.
3. Pour half of the oil into a pan.
4. Spread the sliced onions in the bottom of the baking dish.
5. Sprinkle half of the chopped parsley and garlic on top of the onions.
6. Lay the fish on top of the onions and sprinkle the remaining parsley and garlic on it.
7. Drizzle the remaining oil over everything, then add the white wine and tomatoes (or diluted tomato paste).
8. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 30 minutes.
